The modern home features a great entertaining space, wood floors, lots of light, and high ceilings with a dramatic wall of windows in the living area. Open kitchen with stainless steel appliances, granite, island, gas cooking, lots of cabinets, walk-in pantry, and laundry with a full-size washer & dryer.  The spacious primary suite bath has a huge soaking tub, a large separate shower, and a huge walk-in closet. 2nd bedroom living on 1st floor with full bath. Gated, full-size 2-car garage and a spacious, gated private patio with turf. Minutes from Memorial Park, River Oaks, & Downtown.

Lock & leave luxury in this beautifully designed, gated community home! The open-concept first floor is perfect for entertaining, featuring an oversized family room with a wall of windows, stylish finishes, and a chef-worthy kitchen with stainless steel appliances, convection oven, pendant lighting, and an oversized island. Upstairs, all 3 bedrooms offer privacy, including a spacious primary suite with abundant natural light, double vanity, designer tub, and oversized frameless glass shower. Two secondary bedrooms, a full bath, and a conveniently located laundry room complete the second floor. Enjoy evenings in the backyard—your perfect retreat at the end of the day! Centrally located minutes from major freeways, shopping, dining, and more, this home is a must-see.

Situated on an oversized lot on a quiet residential street, this completely renovated sprawling ranch home is an absolute turn key opportunity. From the inviting courtyard, step into this open concept floor plan home with newly tiled floors, light neutral colors and abundant natural light throughout. The gourmet kitchen features white cabinetry and drawers with oversized kitchen island with glistening quartz countertops. The large Living area features a cozy fireplace and glass doors that look out on to  the patio and private backyard paradise. The Primary Suite features a large bedroom with courtyard views and beautifully appointed spa-like bath with generously large shower, dual vanities and walk in closet. The home also features two additional well sized bedrooms which share a  tastefully appointment bathroom. This all comes with a large two car garage and in-house utility room. Located outside of the flood plain and zoned to well rated Cy-Fair schools. The home shows beautifully.

description:
Beautifully designed and thoughtfully updated, this stunning 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath home blends timeless elegance with modern functionality. From the moment you enter, you’ll notice the exquisite design details, on-trend style, and elevated finishes that make this home truly stand out.

The heart of the home is the beautifully designed kitchen, featuring freshly painted cabinets and island, sleek quartz countertops, a gas cooktop, and upgraded lighting. New downstairs Pella windows flood the space with natural light, creating a bright and inviting atmosphere ideal for everyday living and entertaining.

The private primary suite offers a serene retreat, enhanced with a statement chandelier and elegant wall lighting. The spa-inspired ensuite bath features dual vanities and a frameless glass shower, delivering both style and function. A secondary bedroom on the main floor includes its own ensuite bath—perfect for multigenerational living or hosting guests with comfort and privacy. A formal dining room with a coffered ceiling adds architectural charm, while the dedicated office with French glass doors provides a quiet and stylish workspace.

Upstairs, you’ll find a spacious game room, two additional bedrooms, a full bath, and a media room outfitted with theater-style seating—perfect for movie nights and entertaining.

This home is loaded with smart features, including smart light switches, thermostats, and a video doorbell, offering convenience and peace of mind. Additional highlights include freshly stained garage doors and backyard fence, a three-car garage with enhanced storage solutions, a tankless water heater, and an ionizing ultraviolet air purification system integrated into the HVAC.

For added durability and insurance savings, the home is equipped with new Class 4 impact-resistant shingles installed in 2025.

This exceptional home offers the perfect balance of luxury, comfort, and modern efficiency—and is within walking distance to Watkins Elementary!

Beautiful 4-bedroom home featuring a spacious layout with a living and dining combination, plus a large family room and game room which is perfect for entertaining. The kitchen opens seamlessly to the family room, creating a warm and inviting space. The oversized primary suite offers a relaxing retreat with double sinks, a soaking tub, and a separate shower. Step outside to enjoy your private backyard oasis complete with a swimming pool and two covered patios, ideal for outdoor gatherings. This unique home also includes 3.5 bathrooms and an extended 4-car garage with an iron gated fence. Conveniently located near The Woodlands with easy access to I-45, FM 2920, Grand Parkway, Hardy Toll Road, and Beltway 8. With a little TLC, this home offers incredible potential!

Welcome home to 3607 Misty Ridge, located in the established community of Atascocita Forest and zoned to Humble ISD. This home offers approximately 2,147 square feet of living space, featuring 4 bedrooms, 3.5 bathrooms, an oversized garage, and sits on an expansive 9,600+ sq ft lot. Inside, you’ll find a functional layout with spacious living areas, a well-sized kitchen, and a versatile floor plan ideal for families or those needing extra space.

Conveniently located just minutes from IAH, shopping, parks, and major thoroughfares including Hwy 59 and Beltway 8, this home offers a great combination of space, location, and value—perfect for buyers looking to add their personal touch in a desirable area.

Cash or investor only! Previous contract fell through due to buyer financial issues. Home was fully renovated after damage from Hurricane Harvey and is being sold as is. Pool is not currently functional and will need a new pump per seller. Seller is highly motivated, bring all offers! Send all offers to wellssellshtx@gmail.com

Located in the established Silver Oaks community, this home offers a great opportunity for buyers looking to personalize a property in a convenient Northwest San Antonio location. With easy access to Loop 1604, Highway 151, and nearby shopping, dining, and everyday essentials, the area continues to see strong buyer demand. 

*Priced to reflect work needed, this property presents an opportunity for the next owner to update and create value over time. Whether you’re looking to design your ideal living space or invest in a well-located neighborhood, this is an opportunity worth exploring.
*Existing survey and other information available upon request* Tours available through showing time with a realtor

4-bedroom home in the heart of Fort Worth! Situated just steps from South Meadows Park, enjoy easy access to a covered picnic area, soccer field, and scenic walking trails right outside your door. This home features stainless steel kitchen appliances, granite countertops, wood-look laminate flooring, and storm doors at both the front and back entries. A front bedroom with a charming bay window offers flexibility—perfect for a home office, workout space, or guest room. The spacious living area showcases a cozy corner brick wood-burning fireplace and flows seamlessly into the dining spaces and expansive kitchen. You’ll love the breakfast bar, tiled backsplash, generous cabinet and counter space, and a convenient walk-in pantry. The private primary suite offers a relaxing retreat with a garden tub, separate shower, dual sinks with a dedicated makeup area, and a large walk-in closet. A full-size laundry room includes a drip-dry rack and space for folding. Outside, enjoy a nicely landscaped yard with a mature shade tree, covered back patio, storage shed, and a fully fenced backyard with added privacy.  Located in an established neighborhood with quick access to I-35W and I-20. With some quick updates, this home will shine again!

In need of a little tender loving care- but endless potential! Tucked at the end of a quiet cul-de-sac in the sought-after 78232 area, this two-story home welcomes you in with a sense of warmth the moment you arrive. With its ideal location near McAllister Park and just minutes from Highway 281, you get the perfect blend of peaceful living and everyday convenience. Step inside and you're greeted by natural light pouring into an open, airy living space, where wood-style flooring flows through the main areas, creating a comfortable and connected feel. Your eyes are immediately drawn to the sweeping curved staircase, a true statement piece, that leads to a light-filled loft overlooking the living area and adds character you do not come across every day. The living room feels like the heart of the home, ideal for gathering, relaxing, or hosting friends. Just beyond, the kitchen offers generous cabinet and counter space, giving you a solid foundation to make it your own over time. Upstairs, the primary suite features a unique overlook to the living area below, bringing in additional light and creating an open, elevated feel. Out back, mature trees provide a shaded setting where you can unwind at the end of the day, host a barbecue, or simply enjoy a quiet morning outside. The cul-de-sac location adds an extra sense of privacy while still keeping you close to shopping, dining, and daily essentials. With its inviting layout, distinctive features, and a location that is hard to beat, this home offers a great opportunity to settle into an established neighborhood and truly make the space your own. Schedule your showing and come see the potential for yourself!

This 2 bed/2 bath home is ready for your finishing touches! Separate ADU/guest house can be rented out for additional income. Steps from the University of Houston main campus, MetroRail and close to 288 and 45. Owner put in many upgrades- gutters, windows, ADU remodel/updates, electrical and more!

Beautifully maintained New Orleans style patio home in Sunset Heights close to lots of restaurants and shopping. As you approach the home, you'll notice the classic double-gallery architecture with a gated front yard and inviting front porch. Open living features hardwood floors, built-ins, and seamless flow into a center-island kitchen with marble counters, stainless appliances, and custom cabinetry. Spacious primary suite offers dual vanities and modern finishes, while two secondary bedrooms provide flexibility for guests or office use. Outdoor space includes a brick paver patio, second floor balcony and alley-access with detached 2-car garage. Close to Heights dining, trails, Airline Farmers Market and Whole Foods.

Ideally located in the heart of Sun City Texas, this home offers a central location with convenient access to the community center, amenities, and a wide range of activities. Thoughtfully designed for both comfort and privacy, the floor plan offers ideal separation between the guest bedroom and primary suite, perfect for accommodating visitors. Step outside to your own private retreat with a sparkling pool, enhanced by mature landscaping that provides both beauty and shade. Recent updates include new pool equipment and resurfacing, ensuring worry-free enjoyment. Enjoy year-round outdoor living from the screened-in patio, perfect for relaxing or entertaining without the hassle of insects. Inside, the home is accented with plantation shutters and fresh interior paint, creating a bright and inviting atmosphere throughout. This well-maintained property combines location, functionality, and lifestyle, ideal for enjoying everything Sun City living has to offer.

Lovingly maintained by its original owner since construction, this beautifully updated 4-bedroom, 2.5-bath home sits on a spacious corner lot in the heart of Corinth and offers the perfect blend of comfort, style, and outdoor living. Remodeled in 2021, the home features gorgeous engineered wood floors throughout the first floor, along with thoughtfully updated kitchen and bathrooms. A welcoming entry is flanked by a private office—ideal for working from home—and a formal dining room for hosting gatherings. At the back of the home, the light-filled living room impresses with soaring two-story ceilings, a cozy fireplace, and a wall of windows that frame views of the backyard oasis. The open-concept layout flows seamlessly into the breakfast area and spacious kitchen, complete with abundant white cabinetry, generous counter space, and a center island - perfect for everyday living and entertaining. The primary suite offers a peaceful retreat with a tray ceiling and a beautifully updated ensuite bath featuring dual sinks, a soaking tub, separate shower, and a walk-in closet. A convenient half bath completes the first floor. Upstairs, you’ll find three additional bedrooms, a full bath, and a bright, oversized game room with tray ceiling—ideal for relaxing or play. Step outside to your private backyard retreat, where a sparkling pool takes center stage. The covered patio is designed for entertaining, featuring a built-in grill, bar seating, outdoor speakers, and space for a mini fridge with electricity already in place. A storage shed and ample yard space add even more functionality. Located near the Denton Katy Trail, sports fields, and The Commons at Agora Park with its playground, splash pad, picnic areas, and food truck court, this home also offers easy access to I-35 for a convenient commute. Come experience the warmth, space, and lifestyle this exceptional home has to offer.

Charming Craftsman in the heart of Fort Worth’s coveted Cultural District—an area buyers actively seek for its character, walkability, and proximity to everything that makes Fort Worth special. Located just steps away from the renowned Bowie House Hotel (featured in Landman), world-class art museums, top medical facilities, and only a few miles west of downtown, this home offers both lifestyle and location. Featuring 3 bedrooms and 3 full bathrooms, the home showcases ORIGINAL HARDWOODS throughout, abundant natural light, and timeless architectural details. The formal dining room features a coffered ceiling with direct access to a 14x6 side patio, perfect for entertaining. The kitchen blends original charm cabinetry—freshly painted—with new tile flooring and quartz countertops. Additional upgrades include fresh interior and exterior paint, a newly added gable enhancing neighborhood cohesion, updated plumbing, and a newer tankless water heater. An added benefit is the option for two owner’s suites, with the seller completing a full ensuite bath in the rear bedroom featuring a walk-in shower, marble tile, and granite vanity. Outside, enjoy new sod surrounding the half-moon parking area and additional gravel parking behind the wood fence, with space to build a garage similar to neighboring homes. A 16x10 permitted shed with AC, electricity, plumbing cleanout, and RV outlet offers endless potential for a man cave or future ADU. The floored attic is ideal for storage or a future conversion. With a 2019 5-ton HVAC system, this home delivers both charm and function in one of Fort Worth’s most sought-after neighborhoods.

Stunning 4-bed, 3-bath home featuring an open floor plan and two primary suites in Inwood Forest. The 2 primary suites can be used as a private guest suite or as a multi-generational living layout w/ separate access. Updated luxury vinyl flooring throughout, plantation shutters, fresh paint, and upgraded hardware. The kitchen is equipped w/ a double oven and an SS workstation w/ a double-basin sink and an integrated drying rack for the ultimate chef! The home offers built-in shelves and a wood-burning fireplace in the family room. Major systems: an updated AC (2021) w/ a 10-year parts warranty and an energy-efficient water heater (2018). The exterior features mature trees, a covered patio, and outdoor green space overlooking future parks and trails from the Inwood Forest Regional Detention Project (Q3 2026 completion). A gated U-shaped driveway provides covered parking for up to 6 vehicles. Easy access to Hwy 290, Loop 610, and I-45. You do not want to miss this move-in-ready home!

Must see, one-story, Canavan & Frank custom home with a pool. This property is on a 1+ acre corner lot toward the back of River Chase away from main traffic/FM306 for a quiet and more peaceful setting. Notable features include stunning tongue-and-groove ceilings, concrete flooring throughout, impressive iron front doors, custom cabinetry, well-appointed kitchen with double ovens, stone fireplace w/ built-ins, four side masonry, metal roof, partially fenced/privacy fenced, mature trees and a great backyard entertaining area with pool (heated for fall/winter). Don’t forget to go tour the great amenities residents have access to,  such as a 58 acre PRIVATE Guadalupe River park, multiple swimming pools, fishing pond, walking trails, tennis courts, park/playground and clubhouse with workout facility.  Zoned to Hoffmann Lane Elementary and No City Taxes make this a desirable location. Come tour today.

Seeking natural light? The end unit at 4407 Munger Avenue #1 has 3 walls of windows. This multi-level condominium in the Old East Dallas area near Henderson Avenue & Lower Greenville, showcases green trees and Dallas skyline views from multiple floors.  The large rooftop terrace is the perfect outdoor retreat decked out with lighting and equipped with gas for a grill and water for an outdoor kitchen set up.

The open floor plan on the second level offers treehouse vibes through the oversized picture windows. The kitchen island is a great space for in-kitchen dining or buffet set up. It has ample seating for 4+ along with a built-in beverage refrigerator & lots of cabinets for storage. The Bosch 5-burner, gas range with convection oven makes it easy to entertain and prepare the latest recipes for family and friends.

The property offers 2 bedrooms with en-suite baths, a half bath on the second floor, outdoor living areas on the rooftop and on the ground level, both equipped with water and gas so you can grill or garden with ease.

The primary suite boasts two walk-in closets and a Juliet balcony to take in the city views. The guest room has room for a desk along with a Murphy bed. 

The attached 2 car garage has multiple storage or shelving areas along with a work space for your outdoor projects.

One of four residences in this intimate community, this transitional style unit offers urban living with panoramic views of downtown but without the traffic congestion of city living. The property is conveniently located on the Baylor Hospital grid, so you won’t lose power when you need it the most. Jimmy’s Food Store, St. Martin’s Wine Bistro, E Bar Tex-Mex, Loro Asian Smokehouse & Bar as well as a variety of retail are blocks from this property. Less than 1 mile to the Rustic and Uptown. Rooftop views, picture windows, great location, lock & leave, ready for you to call this address home.

Step into this spacious home on Catlett Lane, featuring a fully remodeled kitchen and bathrooms. Enjoy a large woodworking shop, a versatile extra room, and a bright living room with a stunning fireplace. The generously sized bedrooms offer flexibility for family or a home office. Outside, a fenced backyard with green space awaits for entertaining or relaxing. This 4-bed, 2-bath residence built in 1980 boasts 2375 sqft of living space on a 9020 sqft lot in Fairmont Park. Updates include a kitchen remodel, foundation repair, roof replacement, and HVAC upgrade. Your dream home awaits!

**405 Chandler Lake – Investor’s Dream with Instant Equity**

Welcome to one of the most striking homes on a rare curved corner lot in Fort Worth. This impressive property sits on a massive, multi-tiered front yard that delivers jaw-dropping curb appeal the moment you pull up. Towering trees, sweeping landscaping, and dramatic elevation make this home stand out from every angle.

Inside, you’ll find a beautifully open floorplan that feels bright and spacious. The current owners have already invested **over $60,000 in visible upgrades**, including a brand-new roof (2023), **all new energy-efficient windows**, and a **brand-new HVAC system installed in 2026**. The kitchen and main living areas have been tastefully updated, setting the stage for the perfect blend of modern finishes and timeless charm.

This rare half-renovated gem is ideally suited for an investor or hands-on buyer ready to finish the vision. With the heavy lifting already complete, you can step in and customize the remaining spaces exactly how you (or your buyer) want—creating instant equity and maximum value.

Additional highlights:
- 2-car garage
- Exceptional location with easy access to major highways, shopping, dining, and entertainment
- Prime corner lot with endless curb appeal

Whether you’re looking for your next project or a move-in-ready home with room to grow, 405 Chandler Lake offers the perfect combination of location, size, and upside potential. Don’t miss this opportunity to own a true standout property in Fort Worth. Call today for a private showing and see why this home is generating so much excitement!

Your backyard oasis awaits at 6522 Waterfall! This beautifully updated home offers the perfect blend of comfort, style, and functionality. Step outside to enjoy your own private retreat featuring a newly redone pool, a BBQ pergola, and a spacious covered patio ideal for entertaining guests or unwinding during peaceful Texas evenings. The exterior also includes new gutters and a versatile workshop, providing additional storage or space for hobbies and projects. Inside, the home has been thoughtfully upgraded with fresh interior paint and fully redone flooring throughout, creating a clean and modern feel from the moment you walk in. The kitchen is a true highlight, showcasing custom cabinetry, sleek quartz countertops, and ample space for cooking and gathering. The open and inviting layout makes this home perfect for both everyday living and hosting. With its combination of stylish interior upgrades and exceptional outdoor amenities, this home truly offers the best of indoor and outdoor living. Conveniently located near shopping, dining, and major highways, this move-in ready property is one you don't want to miss!

Welcome to this 5-bedroom residence with modern upgrades. This home offers an impressive array of features inside and out. Downstairs, travertine floors—newly installed in 2025 — 2025 gas range and microwave.
Upstairs, you’ll find a spacious game room, perfect for movie nights, recreation, or a private retreat for family and guests.
Outside is a private oasis featuring a heated swimming pool built in 2025, along with a relaxing jacuzzi, making this backyard perfect for year-round enjoyment. The oversized driveway easily accommodates multiple vehicles.
This home also offers peace of mind with major recent upgrades, including a 2024 roof and water heater, and installed surveillance cameras. Don't miss the tour video.

With its thoughtful updates and generous living spaces, this home is truly move-in ready and stands out. Schedule your private showing today and experience everything this remarkable property has to offer.

Introducing The Madison, a two-story home featured in Redbird Ranch in San Antonio, TX. Inside this 5 bedroom, 3 bathroom home, you'll find 2489 square feet of open-concept living. A long entryway leads to a blended dining area, gourmet kitchen, and living room, perfect for entertaining and every day living. Your kitchen includes quartz counter tops, stainless steel appliances, shaker style cabinetry, and a grand kitchen island, complete with a roomy single basin sink and quartz breakfast bar. The corner pantry is spacious and includes plenty of built-in shelving. With a secondary bedroom and full bath located off the living room, this home offers private space for out-of-town guests. Head up the wide staircase to find a versatile loft, the private main bedroom suite, three secluded secondary bedrooms with carpet flooring, large windows and closets and a third full bath. The private main bedroom is an oasis, featuring a cozy sitting area and attractive ensuite bathroom. Enjoy quality quartz vanity tops, a tiled walk-in shower, a separate water closet, and a walk-in closet with plenty of space to get ready in the morning. Additional features include sheet vinyl flooring in entry, living room, and all wet areas, quartz bathroom counter tops, and our HOME IS CONNECTED base package. Using one central hub that talks to all the devices in your home, you can control the lights, thermostat and locks, all from your cellular device.

Beautifully maintained and thoughtfully updated, this 3 bedroom, 2 bath home offers the perfect blend of comfort, functionality, and outdoor living in an established San Antonio neighborhood. With strong curb appeal, mature trees, manicured landscaping, attractive stone and Hardie Plank siding, and updated double-pane Champion windows throughout, this home stands out from the moment you arrive.  Inside, the semi-open floor plan creates an easy flow between the entry, dining, living, and kitchen spaces. The spacious living room features a striking shiplap accent wall, stone fireplace, and plenty of room to gather with family and friends. The oversized primary suite offers a peaceful retreat with dual closets and an updated en suite bath featuring a large standing shower and updated vanity.  The kitchen includes stainless steel appliances, pantry storage, and a utility room with additional cabinetry for extra functionality. Throughout the home, updated flooring, tasteful improvements, and major system upgrades make this property move-in ready while still offering room for a buyer to personalize.  The backyard is designed for entertaining and everyday enjoyment with a covered patio, wrap-around walkway, mature landscaping, and a resurfaced pool with updated tile and equipment completed in 2022. Additional updates include roof replacement in 2015 with Owens Corning 25-year shingles, Hardie Plank siding added in 2017, new HVAC system and furnace installed in 2021 with added attic insulation, water softener refreshed in 2025, and a new garage door opener replaced in 2025.  Whether you are looking for a family home, a place to entertain, or a property with long-term value thanks to extensive system updates, this home offers an exceptional opportunity in a convenient San Antonio location.

The property offers 2 bedrooms with en-suite baths, a half bath on the second floor, outdoor living areas on the rooftop and on the ground level, both equipped with water and gas so you can grill or garden with ease.

The primary suite boasts two walk-in closets and a Juliet balcony to take in the city views. The guest room has room for a desk along with a Murphy bed. 

The attached 2 car garage has multiple storage or shelving areas along with a work space for your outdoor projects.

One of four residences in this intimate community, this transitional style unit offers urban living with panoramic views of downtown but without the traffic congestion of city living. The property is conveniently located on the Baylor Hospital grid, so you won’t lose power when you need it the most. Jimmy’s Food Store, St. Martin’s Wine Bistro, E Bar Tex-Mex, Loro Asian Smokehouse & Bar as well as a variety of retail are blocks from this property. Less than 1 mile to the Rustic and Uptown. Rooftop views, picture windows, great location, lock & leave, ready for you to call this address home.
